calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Those Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate.
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Guilio Accornero for (petitioner) Scott Montagna.

The Court confirmed with Mr. Accornero that there has been no word from Mr. Weinkauf. Mr. Accornero reported that they responded to the examiner's notes, that the assignments were filed, that if the assignments are being challenged he will need to withdraw and that they would like to go through with the entitlement petition. The Court stated that it needs time records and a response to the notes from December. Mr. Accornero stated that this usually comes up at final distribution, that the examiner wants it now, that the court should cite ARB to come in and explain and that if they take the petition off calendar they will have nothing else to proceed on. The Court stated that it is prepared to take the petition off calendar. Mr. Accornero stated that he can file declarations within a week. The Court stated that it is not sure why the petition should not be taken off calendar and that Mr. Accornero will be contacted. Subsequent to the hearing it was decided that the petition will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Mayo. (Not Reported)
